item.title: CCTV Exposed McSweeney Lurking in the Shadows
item.description: A recent study by the Femicide Census found that a woman is killed by a man every three days in the UK. In June 2022, a violent predator was prowling the streets of Ilford, East London, looking for a victim. The brutal encounter that followed shocked the nation and added volume to a growing voice – a voice calling for action to address the serious issue of femicide in the UK. This is what happens when a night out with friends ends in a chance encounter with evil. This is the murder of Zara Aleena.

media:content.media:title: CCTV Exposed McSweeney Lurking in the Shadows
media:content.media:description: A recent study by the Femicide Census found that a woman is killed by a man every three days in the UK. In June 2022, a violent predator was prowling the streets of Ilford, East London, looking for a victim. The brutal encounter that followed shocked the nation and added volume to a growing voice – a voice calling for action to address the serious issue of femicide in the UK. This is what happens when a night out with friends ends in a chance encounter with evil. This is the murder of Zara Aleena.

item.title: What They Found in His Freezer Was Nauseating!
item.description: When you hear of the horrific things that happen on the dark web you think they are just mythical stories or exaggerated but many are just the tip of the iceberg. This episode is one that will make you shudder. I genuinely cannot comprehend the fear that Cassidy Rainwater went through when James Phelps and Timothy Norton kidnapped her. This case is straight out of a horror movie. Em x

media:content.media:title: What They Found in His Freezer Was Nauseating!
media:content.media:description: When you hear of the horrific things that happen on the dark web you think they are just mythical stories or exaggerated but many are just the tip of the iceberg. This episode is one that will make you shudder. I genuinely cannot comprehend the fear that Cassidy Rainwater went through when James Phelps and Timothy Norton kidnapped her. This case is straight out of a horror movie. Em x
